name: Arlo Technologies, Inc.
description: Arlo Technologies, Inc. provides a smart home security platform in the United States and internationally. The company offers smart connected devices, including wire-free smart Wi-Fi-enabled cameras, video doorbells, floodlight cameras, and home security systems, as well as connectivity hubs. It also provides Arlo Secure, a subscription service that offers cloud storage, advanced object detection, rich notifications, and other smart security features. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Carlsbad, California.
